programme.desc: 以弘扬中华民族传统文化、播撒五千年古老文明、关注中国与世界重大的文艺活动、用精彩的电视文艺作品为海内外华人观众打开一扇精神视窗为目标。

programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 收视指南

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 环球综艺秀

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: Beyond the Readings: Restoring the Faith
programme.desc: With the power of spirit behind Theresa, her journey giving the ultimate gift of peace continues. A touching follow-up message from a podcast reading confirms Theresa's lasting impact on those in need.

programme.title: Vanished In Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing when her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents will need to make unlikely allies if they are to find their daughter before she disappears forever.

programme.title: Naana and Daren
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with a stunning ocean view. In addition, they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Ramen Around Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: Seafood Fra Diavolo
programme.desc: John is heading out on tour with his band, and to send him off Rachael whips up one of his favourite meals: seafood fra diavolo, a combination of shellfish and pasta tossed with a tomato-based sauce.
With the Top 10 decided, it's Day One of Sweet Week and Adriano Zumbo kicks things off with a wonderfully wobbly jelly Mystery Box.

programme.title: Destinations Impossible
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: A Diff-occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Spicy Bucatini all'Amatriciana with Beans and Greens
programme.desc: Rachael show how to take that favourite summer staple of grilled corn on the cob to a whole new level by combining it with spicy chilli and more, with her recipe for Mexican street-corn pasta.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.
Five men set out on an eco-journey to Mongolia: leader Kim Seok-hoon, Kwon Yul, Lim Woo-il, Shin Jae-ha and nomad Shaun. With only backpacks, they have a shared mission to 'clean the Earth'.

programme.title: Theresa's Holy House
programme.desc: An emotional Theresa finds out her father-in-law has passed and then feels his presence in the following days while shopping for Holy Water.

programme.title: Sibling Flip Out
programme.desc: James and his team partner with brother-sister newbie flippers Blake and Abby on a risky zombie house project. James funds the renovation, while the siblings manage the contractors and oversee the work.

programme.title: Jamaican Beef Pot Pie
programme.desc: Chef Deborah elevates the classic Jamaican beef patty by giving it a Southern twist and turning it into a delicious pot pie. This hearty and flavourful dish offers a vibrant journey to the Caribbean.

programme.title: Marissa and Sean
programme.desc: Marissa and Sean need more space. With a growing toddler and Sean working from home, they are busting at the seams. They want a house with a great view and coastal charm.

programme.title: Pollo Al Mattone
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sauteed greens.

programme.title: Texas Taxidermy
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: Reuben Hot Dogs
programme.desc: Rachael combines her favourite Reuben sandwich with America's summer favourite, hot dogs, to create a memorable meal served with fries.

programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: 筑梦天下
programme.desc: 荟萃中外历史建筑，赏析现代经典设计；寻访民居风俗故事，分享另类家居理念。

programme.title: 风云对话

programme.desc: 以自述的方式讲述普通香港人的故事，反映他们普通却独到的闪光之处。

programme.desc: Inspired by the European lifestyle, a newlywed couple moves from Chicago to Amsterdam. She wants a quiet neighbourhood, but he craves the city.

programme.title: Diamond In The Rough
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a listing for a small home near the beach in Costa Mesa, Calif., but it will require a large renovation.

programme.title: A Forever Home In Sicily
programme.desc: A Sicilian-American woman seeks to establish a permanent home in her grandmother's hometown of Terrasini, Italy.

programme.title: 请问今晚住谁家
programme.desc: 真人打工旅游实境节目，每趟旅程由窦智孔、王传一分别领军艺人来宾组成的「型男打工团」， 一起结伴远离都市尘嚣，探访最疗愈的乡间秘境。

programme.title: 全民星攻略

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Runaway Tour
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Tatocar Takeover
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses a remote control to drive the Tato Team to the far side of the supermarket. Can they return and save the fruit and veggie aisle?

programme.title: The Amazing Jalapeno
programme.desc: Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

programme.title: Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Grannies
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: The Creek
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: Orangutans
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: Orangutans
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: Three
programme.desc: Laa‐Laa has fun counting to three; 1, 2, 3 rabbits, 1, 2, 3 flowers and 1, 2, 3 trees! Laa-Laa even counts three Teletubbies; Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po.

programme.title: Pyjamas
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pyjamas' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we see lots of different pyjamas - pink pyjamas, striped pyjamas, spotty pyjamas and banana pyjamas.

programme.title: Weather Balloons
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: Big Top Bo
programme.desc: Tao can't go on with his circus performance, so there are going to be some disappointed fans, unless Bo agrees to do all the acts for him - with some help from Mojo's tops!

programme.title: Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Floating Farms, Bangladesh
programme.desc: Glitch's trip to a funky floating farm becomes a rescue mission on a fast-flowing river.

programme.title: Bike
programme.desc: Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Mum School
programme.desc: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greenie. But she soon discovers that mothering is much harder than she imagined.

programme.title: Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Andy and the Chimps
programme.desc: Andy heads to Africa to meet some chimpanzee's and tracks down some kapok tree seeds.

programme.title: Star
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: Chocolate Hills, Philippines
programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: Ace's Brave Jump
programme.desc: Thomas is in Australia where racing car Ace is planning a big jump across lots of buses.

programme.title: Moon's Exhibition
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: Pond Prose
programme.desc: Sarah is inspired by listening to a poetry record and decides to make up some poetry of her own.

programme.title: Treat
programme.desc: Stanley's friends throw him a birthday party. No work for Stan today. Cynthia and Jose take a call from Amare, her tractor is stuck in the mud. Soon, so are all Stanley's vehicles.

programme.title: Detective
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to help solve the mystery of the Phantom Knitter. Overhearing this, Fifi jumps at the chance to help forming a dynamic, detective duo!

programme.title: I Can Run a Million Fast
programme.desc: From lions that love to climb to meerkats who play golf, the funny animals talk about all the brilliant stuff they love to do to keep active.

programme.title: It's time to put on a show
programme.desc: JoJo doesn't know what to do with her odd socks, so Gran Gran suggests they put on a puppet show! The two of them turn the socks into puppets, ready for a show in the garden.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Pass the Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: The Opposites Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with help from their animal friends!

programme.title: Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Rainbow
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.title: Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song "I Love The Rain".

programme.title: Garlic
programme.desc: Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Evil Pea's Party Plan
programme.desc: It's Evil Pea's birthday, but she and Carrot are trapped in the bottom of her freezer. They must put their differences aside and work together to escape.

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 新四十二章
programme.desc: 猪肉档老板娘朱萤娇(龚嘉欣饰)天生神力，却得了会生胡须的怪病，渴望寻找「四十二章经」宝藏内的神药治病。大学中文系教授章经(陈豪饰)多年前已醉心寻找这个传说中的宝藏，惟因一次事故大受打击，一直饱受失眠症困扰。数学天才邵桂芝(江嘉敏饰)机灵聪敏，对急症室病房男护士柯建宁(周嘉洛饰)一见倾心。桂芝游走于正邪之间，也极想找到宝藏，以求一朝发达。章经、萤娇和桂芝因缘际会之下相遇，为抢夺宝藏而各出奇谋，争夺过程中开展了人性的善恶争战，斗过你死我活……

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 猪肉档老板娘朱萤娇(龚嘉欣饰)天生神力，却得了会生胡须的怪病，渴望寻找「四十二章经」宝藏内的神药治病。大学中文系教授章经(陈豪饰)多年前已醉心寻找这个传说中的宝藏，惟因一次事故大受打击，一直饱受失眠症困扰。数学天才邵桂芝(江嘉敏饰)机灵聪敏，对急症室病房男护士柯建宁(周嘉洛饰)一见倾心。桂芝游走于正邪之间，也极想找到宝藏，以求一朝发达。章经、萤娇和桂芝因缘际会之下相遇，为抢夺宝藏而各出奇谋，争夺过程中开展了人性的善恶争战，斗过你死我活……

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.desc: 猪肉档老板娘朱萤娇(龚嘉欣饰)天生神力，却得了会生胡须的怪病，渴望寻找「四十二章经」宝藏内的神药治病。大学中文系教授章经(陈豪饰)多年前已醉心寻找这个传说中的宝藏，惟因一次事故大受打击，一直饱受失眠症困扰。数学天才邵桂芝(江嘉敏饰)机灵聪敏，对急症室病房男护士柯建宁(周嘉洛饰)一见倾心。桂芝游走于正邪之间，也极想找到宝藏，以求一朝发达。章经、萤娇和桂芝因缘际会之下相遇，为抢夺宝藏而各出奇谋，争夺过程中开展了人性的善恶争战，斗过你死我活……

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: 34 Hari Nyender di Hati Ketua Khapunkhap
programme.desc: Jirayut travels to Indonesia to find the mother who left him as a child. He meets Halda, a ketoprak vendor who offers to help. However, Halda secretly plots to hire a 'fake mother' to secure a share of the inheritance left by Jirayut’s father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bukan Preman Bener Tapi Beneran Preman
programme.desc: Aldo (Ridho Illahi), a local thug, tries to sneak into a haunted house without paying, sparking a war of words with the feisty Qia (Indah Nicole). After his girlfriend dumps him for his criminal lifestyle, Aldo finds himself drawn to Qia, even as his own father plots to shut down the night market entirely.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals

programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.desc: Lily introduces Jack to her favorite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll. // Slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: FarmerBob / Gary & Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay. // Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal - Spot.

programme.title: In a Space Pickle / Stare Wars
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe. // Patrick and GrandPat have a staring contest to compete for the last lick of a baking spoon.

programme.title: Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose
programme.desc: A shape-shifting alien runs loose in the Star home.

programme.title: Only Mime Will Tell / The Winning Spirit
programme.desc: For her try-out for the Varsity Mime Team, Luan must be silent for an entire day. // Afraid of failing her PE exam again, Lucy recruits the Morticians Club to help her pass.

programme.title: InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Swimming Fools / The Goobfather
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds "Patty Whips" to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Dance Off
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person.

programme.title: Andakakasam S04
programme.desc: A comedy game show featuring fun challenges, pranks, and humorous twists, entertaining families across generations.

programme.title: Andakakasam S04

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai
programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.desc: Teen girls' medical dreams are dashed by forced marriage to a patriarchal family. She struggles to adapt while clinging to her aspirations.

programme.title: Dhanam - Ungalil Oruthi
programme.desc: A debt-ridden man's attempt to report smugglers for a reward backfires, leading to a dangerous pursuit as the criminals seek revenge on him.

programme.title: Kanmani Anbudan
programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare - Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai
programme.desc: A poetic drama about love, memory, and childhood emotions as characters grow. Simple moments reveal how love shapes memory, guiding growth through tender, evolving feelings.

programme.title: Ayyanar Thunai
programme.desc: In a bid to escape her ill-fate, Nila becomes the daughter-in-law of a family with a tainted past. Can she restore their lost hope, or will it shatter hers?

programme.title: Mahanadhi Sagodharigalin Kadhai
programme.desc: When a family loses their father, the sole member of their lives, they take it as a challenge to rise back stronger in all situations.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam
programme.desc: For her father's word, Bairavi ties the knot with Arumugam, while Siva rejects Sindhu's proposal yet ends up marrying her. How will these couples find solace?

programme.title: Thaai Maman- Thaiku Nigaranavan
programme.desc: The story follows family members facing duties, sacrifices, and emotions as they strive to stay united despite conflicts and hardships testing their bond and resilience.

programme.title: Azhagae Azhagu
programme.desc: Shanmugam reunites with his childhood sweetheart, hires her as a housemaid because she needs work. His wife protests when she learns of the arrangement tonight.

programme.title: Pandian Stores Thanthai Sol Mikka Mandhi
programme.desc: Pandian's life is centered around his large, close-knit family. But when his children get involved with dangerous rivals, will their strong family bonds survive the challenges?

programme.title: Kana Kandenadi
programme.desc: Set against water scarcity, this film follows three people: Baskar, a desalination hopeful; Archana, his wife; Madan, an influencer. Together they triumph through clever plans.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Kena Tipu Cinta Neng Rujak Bahagianya Tuh Disini
programme.desc: Tells the story of a beautiful girl named Cindy (Nabila Zavira). Besides being beautiful, Cindy is a cheerful, independent girl who sells fruit salad around every day to make ends meet. One day, Cindy meets a rich girl. Over time, they become friends. One time, when Cindy was selling on a bicycle, she accidentally hit Maxim's (Kevin Hillers) car. Maxim, who found out about this, was immediately furious and scolded Cindy because the price of her car was expensive.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Dunia Ini Pahit, Yang Manis Hanya Neng The
programme.desc: Adit was sent to the village because his father died and went bankrupt. He left a will for Adit to stay there and meet his father's best friend. In the village, Adit also met Yuna, a beautiful village girl who worked as a traveling tea seller, who was none other than the daughter of his father's best friend. While in the village, Adit accompanied Yuna around selling tea and the two became closer.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Satu Mimpi Beda Profesi Satu Cinta
programme.desc: The life of a beautiful girl named Ines (Esta Pramanita). To make ends meet, Ines works as a traveling dangdut singer.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) refuses to accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea told him that Bryan's travel business was a scam. Because of Dhea, Bryan suffered losses and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work at Bryan's travel business for two weeks.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2

programme.title: Kalo Rocker Juga Manusia Kenapa Aku DiSia-Sia?
programme.desc: When a young rocker who dreams of becoming a musician is sent to live in a rural area by his father, he meets Asih, a beautiful village girl, the daughter of the caretaker of the villa Kala's father owns. Kala is immediately captivated by Asih's beautiful face and kind heart.

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) from a fire. Bimo recently broke up with Indah because she was too focused on her restaurant. Bimo tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.title: Brest dockworkers

programme.title: The day we ate together
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: The cinema screen

programme.title: Here's a moose
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ?
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Mambar Pierrette
programme.desc: In Douala, in a poor district in the city, the everyday life of Pierrette, a seamstress who takes care of her two children and invalid mother alone. Bravely determined and discrete, she is used to getting by from day-to-day but never gives up.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: As President Hamelin takes part in the unveiling of a commemorative bust, he realises that he has still done nothing for Quebec that could be called ''great''. He tasks Karine and Councillor Arsenault with finding him a project that will go down in history.

programme.title: Everything's falling apart!
programme.desc: The country is submerged by a vast power cut! In an emergency meeting, Harvey and Robillard, CEO of Hydro Quebec, lie to the president about the real cause of the problem. Stephane and Major Zephir continue their investigation into the terrorist threat to the university.

programme.title: Schisms, terrorism and other earthquakes
programme.desc: Electricity outages are increasingly intense and increasingly frequent throughout Quebec. Harvey has no choice but to explain the reality of the situation to Hamelin. The terrorist threat still hangs over both the university and Gabrielle.

programme.title: National crisis
programme.desc: Because the USA depends largely on Quebec for its electricity, American President RIchards demands that Hamelin resolves the power outages, threatening to cut Quebec off economically if he doesn't. It's consternation all round...

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: A long (very long) and cold (very cold) winter
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: The crazy barbecue
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: Jeans
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: ama Gloria
programme.desc: Six-year-old Cleo lives with her kind, but often absent father, and her nanny Gloria, who she loves. But Gloria has to definitively return to Cap Verde to look after her children. The separation is brutal and Cleo is crushed. Her father sends her to spend the summer with Gloria.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Capharnaumia
programme.desc: A director in love with his actress catches her with someone else. Out of revenge, he cuts all her scenes from the film. The producer finds out and does everything to recover the original version.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall (S1)
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: The Persians - A History of Iran (S1)
programme.desc: In this first episode, Samira journeys to places rarely seen by western audiences to reveal how the Persian Empire was born, the mysterious writing of its early people and how Iran's powerful kings built a vast empire that became the envy of the ancient world.

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, our ancient powers are just beginning, they must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather (S5)
programme.desc: A wind driven wildfire consumes a Colorado neighbourhood. In New Mexico, freezing conditions trap 21 people in an ice-covered tram car.

programme.title: Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Asia has the longest coastline of any continent and the earth's richest coral reefs. This episode explores Asia's waters, as spectacular as they are diverse, and never-seen-before animal behaviour.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how crispy, lip-smacking Kettle potato chips are specially crinkled for maximum dipping power; sweet, melt-in-your-mouth meringue cookies get their delicate texture in an unconventional oven.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how an aromatic blend of exotic spices is packed into pakoras, a mouthwatering, deep-fried Indian fritter; the bakers of decadently custardy Napoleon bars fold thousands of tiny layers into flaky French pastry; fiery jalapeno peppers are added to a creamy, nutty hummus.

programme.title: Kingdom (S1)

programme.title: Cities

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 巨塔之后

programme.title: 珠玉在侧

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 又一起死亡案件让判昊开始动摇，青江害怕没命，把重要证据交给了张警官。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 宴遇永安

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成得睿晖捐肾保住性命，但身体大不如前。明塱医院山边发现疑于二十年前遭人杀害的一副男性头骨，死者正是一妍一直寻找的赵定国。以珈带领调查小组，调查收受承建商利益一事，启心带着睿晖出席，以永成兆业代表自居。 ICAC拘捕建邦，原来他正是收受利益之人。启澄发现是丽雪偷取建邦电脑内的证据，质问之下，丽雪道出是启心下命令举报建邦。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 珠玉在侧
programme.desc: 绮裴阁家主裴楚风为当朝皇后制成辉月凤冠，竞争对手苏玉轩得知消息，诓骗武林高手单敬天盗取珍宝。赵护卫舍命护冠，凤冠的水胆琥珀落入其女襁褓。敌众我寡，赵护卫坠崖，单敬天幡然醒悟，带着残损的凤冠和婴儿单单单跃下山崖。 一晃十五年，单单单的姐姐单双双调查到苏家和凤冠遗失有关，凭借高超的技艺孤身入苏玉轩，得到了少爷苏玨的青睐。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 白发鬼
programme.desc: 年轻俊秀，生于名门望族的日籍华人林保，自幼失去父母，与大学好友川村感情深厚。二人都对美少女琉璃子心存爱慕，但川村自怜身世，不敢与林保争夺，林保顺利娶得琉璃子为妻。林保出国公干期间，川村和琉璃子耐不住寂寞，有了奸情。不久之后，林保竟在一次滑雪中意外身亡...

programme.title: 降头
programme.desc: 狄龙剧中为一准新郎，但却遇上心术不正的恬妮单恋痴缠，更借助邪术降头，务求夺取男方欢心。后恬妮裙下之臣罗烈及狄龙未婚妻，亦相继加入战团。一场因为爱而生与死的斗争，复杂的关系加上正邪大斗法，将人性为达一己私欲的恶行，表露无遗。至于邪是否不能胜正？且看结局便有分晓。

programme.title: 独臂刀王
programme.desc: 独臂刀方刚与妻子二人息隐归田，但当方刚的妻子被掳走，他唯有被迫重出江湖对付武林恶党「八大刀王」，以救回妻子。

programme.title: 金玉良缘红楼梦
programme.desc: 根据中国古典文学巨著红楼梦改编。贾宝玉出身京城中的名门望族贾府，与表妹林黛玉彼此相恋。可惜他们的恋情为贾母所不容，更使计瞒骗宝玉另娶一富家女，结果令宝玉和黛玉这对金童玉女落入悲惨的下场。

programme.title: 鬼马两金刚
programme.desc: 一名强盗和一位居无定所的赌徒合作以赌赚钱。一天，他们成功从叛国军阀屋里偷取一大笔金钱，途中却遇上革命战士，并希望他们能资助革命叛军计划。二人是否会用偷来的财富协助革命战士？

programme.title: 瀛台泣血
programme.desc: 清朝末年，光绪帝亲政后，开始着手维新变法，惜改革触犯了想保全自身富贵功名的官僚的阻扰。支持皇帝变法的康有为性格软弱，坚持变法的谭嗣同难免浮躁，光绪深知自己的处境危险，于是企图利用袁世凯去对付握有兵权的荣禄。但在关键时刻，袁世凯见风使舵却向荣禄告了密，出卖了光绪...

programme.title: 魔殿屠龙
programme.desc: 本片算是金庸《倚天屠龙记》之外传。由尔冬升饰张无忌、狄龙饰蒙古战士、万梓良饰宋青书及钟楚红饰蒙古公主。故事讲述张无忌取回倚天剑、屠龙刀，供放在明教总坛，并将九阳神功秘笈刻于三重峰密室之中，由已皈依佛门的金毛狮王监守，原经交回少林...

programme.title: 椰林春恋
programme.desc: 富商之子平建人由于不愿继承父业，决定跟女朋友苏咏兰自开旅行社，招揽女教师董娴芸和四个少女学生游览马来西亚。咏兰在旅途中眼看女学生李爱蓉痴恋建人，又误会建人与娴芸相恋，伤心失望离去。后来发现娴芸早有情人梁茂夫，一场误会始告冰释。爱蓉得悉建人将与咏兰结婚，精神失常，驾车撞山受伤昏迷......

programme.title: 通天小子红枪客
programme.desc: 通天少爷李宝通乃棉胎店老板李昌建之独子，平素不服父亲管教外，还经常整蛊作怪；古板严谨的李昌建，屡遭儿子作弄亦不自知。宝通经常暗中替乔装乞丐的侦缉队长陈英刚买食物，并向他学习武功；后英刚给「红枪客」林飞杀死，宝通正好在暗处看见事发经过，并偷听到林飞所透露的犯案者名字。此时，宝通行踪被发现，幸宝通机智，得以逃脱，惟其胸部上的苍鹰刺青已被林飞看到...

programme.title: 江山美人
programme.desc: 正德皇帝江南遇李凤，两人互生情愫。临别前正德声言回京后会立即迎娶李凤。一年后，当他派人接李凤回宫时，她已病重，无法承受长途跋涉。虽然最终及时赶到，却在心爱之人的怀里离世......

programme.title: 掌门人
programme.desc: 为「功夫大导」刘家良于1983年自编自导自演的作品。故事描述，刘代师傅主持国术会，一向平安无事，适逢会馆搬迁，刘派女儿惠英红接掌；新旧派作风回异，刘只得离去；后因惠频惹是非，刘闻讯即回巢声援...

programme.title: 乌龙济公
programme.desc: 济公与修道成仙的吕洞宾斗智斗法，二人使出浑身解数，不论是笑声、法力、风流韵事，甚至乎兵器，双方都不惜一切对决到底！

programme.title: 8-Bit of Trouble / The Founding Feathers
programme.desc: When Archibald accidentally gets digitized by Loy’s laser scanner, he finds himself trapped inside a computer game. / Archibald discovers a long lost play that chronicles the founding of Crackridge. But when he over-promises a same day production, he must scramble to put on the historic show.

programme.title: Welcome Back Otter
programme.desc: Abigail puts herself at risk to reunite an orphaned otter with his family. But the school veterinarian insists the animal will be safer at the zoo.

programme.title: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Team Voltron grapples with whether or not they can trust Lotor

programme.title: Robo-Dog Day Afternoon / Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Scaredy Cat Boot Camp / Ichabeezer Moves Out
programme.desc: Mr. Pea helps the Veggies face their fears in an overnight boot camp/Bob and Petunia try to encourage Ichabeezer to stay when he wants to move out

programme.title: The Missing Jetpack / Bacon Vs. Tomato
programme.desc: LarryBoy and Junior No-pack must investigate when Junior's jetpack is missing/Bob gets jealous when Larry calls Bacon Bill his BFF

programme.title: Little Sisters / Tricky Treasure
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Crabby / Spe-shell
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Let's Make A Movie!
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Pete The Polar Bear
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Boo to You
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Rodney J. Dinkle, Babysitter / Lights Out
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Gratitude
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Tail to the Chief / Chaser and Chewer: Part Chew
programme.desc: When Tag volunteers to be Mayor for the day, she promises everyone an ice cream party. But as she tries to do everything herself, the party plans begin to fall apart. Until Tag realizes that being a great Mayor means knowing when to ask for help. / Comic book villains Flea and Thunder (aka Frank and Beans) have teamed up with a Wicked Chicken to cause chicken-related havoc on Pawston. Heroes Chaser and Chewer (aka Tag and Scooch), team up with Flora Fedora (Lady Lydia) to save the town.

programme.title: The Puppy Whisperer / Doggy Book of World Records
programme.desc: Tag becomes jealous when Yip prefers to spend time with puppy-sitter Beans instead of with her. Determined to win Yip back, Tag enlists the help of Cheddar Biscuit, Gilber, Spike and Frank to try and win him back. / Frank and Beans find out that Tag and Scooch are trying to get into the Doggy Book of World Records and sabotage every attempt. When Tag and Scooch find out what the sneaky duo are up to, they come up with a plan to outsmart them.

programme.title: Dollhouse Defenders
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Mixed-Up Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: DJ's Glow Ride
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Rainy Day Banana
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Shockarachnids
programme.desc: Dozer and Skya work together to find their way home after they are attacked by Shockarachnids, jumper-cable-like snakes with high-voltage bites

programme.title: Lucky and the Endless Possibilities
programme.desc: When Aunt Cora throws a career day at school, Lucky struggles to figure out what she wants to be when she grows up.

programme.title: Scimitar
programme.desc: While searching for items missing from the treasure house, Puss enlists the help of the Scimitar, an evil sword that turns its wielder wicked.

programme.title: Stories
programme.desc: Artephius and the orphans are alone in town when a Celtic thunder god demands to be let into the treasure house - or he will destroy San Lorenzo!

programme.title: Baby Face Off / The Pursuit Of Wrinkliness
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Croodtopia / Hand On A Hard Egg
programme.desc: When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids (including Lerk and Womp) use the chance to create their own society ("you-topia") with no rules, but Eep and Thunk disagree on how to run it/Food is scarce and when a large egg is spotted on the hunting field, Grug, Eep, Snoot, Munk and Squawk call dibbs. It's decided that whoever is tough enough to be the last holding on, wins the food.

programme.title: Live and let Fly
programme.desc: Hiccup and the gang start a secret club to prepare for the Outcast offensive.

programme.title: The Iron Gronkle
programme.desc: When Meatlug accidentally ingests magnetic rocks, she becomes magnetic herself - causing destruction through the town, but ultimately helping the kids win a battle against the Outcasts.

programme.title: Undercover
programme.desc: Jun forms an unlikely connection with Sledkin.

programme.title: Webs' Masters
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.title: Sledkin Stakeout
programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Boss thought that breaking his arm was painful;but the true pain starts at pediatrician Dr. Kevin’s "jokes." Boss enlists the playgroup babies to defang the doctor of his "comedian’s disease." Tim obsesses about keeping his little brother safe.

programme.title: Escape From Krinkle's
programme.desc: Boss has an opportunity to get his old job back at Baby Corp;but to get the interview;he’ll need the playgroup babies to help him escape Marsha Krinkle’s super-safe Bubbeezee playroom. Tim nearly misses Kabob Day at school.

programme.title: Puppy Party!
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a "No-Paperworkist" movement to avoid Buddy From HR’s constant paperwork.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Ludicrous Lunacy of the Loopy Laserlightmare
programme.desc: Despite being terrible at the job, Krupp wants to be the camp director again next summer. That's something Harold and George simply cannot abide.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Shocking Showdown of the Staggering Sugamechangere
programme.desc: It's parents' weekend at Lake Summer Camp, and Krupp's eager to make amends with Harold and George ... or so he says.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Polarizing Plight of the Pitiless Poopetrators
programme.desc: George and Harold want Cash Networth to buy the camp and fire Krupp. But before he'll agree to pony up the dough, Cash has a small request of his own.

programme.title: Undercover
programme.desc: Jun forms an unlikely connection with Sledkin.

programme.title: Webs' Masters
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: A Fistful of Herbs
programme.desc: When Po discovers he was poisoned, he sets off to a caravan oasis in the hopes of finding out who the perpetrator is, unknowingly followed by the kid

programme.title: Poison in the Pit of the Plum
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Big Trouble in Panda Village
programme.desc: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao

programme.title: Waka Chaka
programme.desc: When Jim and Toby investigate a Goblin attack, they discover Changelings are secretly living amongst them and rebuilding the Killahead Bridge!

programme.title: Win, Lose Or Draal
programme.desc: Everything comes into perspective when Jim discovers his re-match with Draal is to the death.

programme.title: To Catch A Changeling
programme.desc: After Jim finds the Killahead Bridge has been moved, he must use a horseshoe to find who in Arcadia is a changeling.

programme.title: Chasing Phantoms
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: The Convoy
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: MLM Terbaik 2019
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: Afternoon Ambush
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Complex Terror
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion sparks a manhunt for a stranger terrorising a Tulsa housing complex.

programme.title: Face Off
programme.desc: Forensic dentist Dr Carl Leung recounts his work with the Hong Kong Police on the 'Hello Kitty Murder' and helping to solve a killing spree.

programme.title: Voice of the Dead
programme.desc: From identifying body parts to murder disguised as suicide, Taiwan's veteran forensic pathologist unravels these vicious lies.

programme.title: Melissa Lucio
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: Unholy Man
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: Lovers, Lies And Canyon Murder
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: Bob (Part B)
programme.desc: After learning his partner was stealing, enduring heart surgery, and facing other hardships, Bob withdrew into his 7,000-sq-ft Victorian mansion, filling it with antiques.

programme.title: Andre McDonald
programme.desc: An American Dream becomes a tragedy when San Antonio businesswoman Andreen McDonald goes missing. Four years later, her husband, Air Force Major Andre McDonald, is on trial for her murder.

programme.title: Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Nightclub Murder Or Self-Defense Shooting?
programme.desc: An argument erupts outside a Florida nightclub. One man is killed, and another is charged with murder. Was it a case of cold-blooded murder, or did he have to shoot to save his own life?

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The audience thinks it's part of the act when the Hulk rushes on stage to save a rock star.

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: To locate a hoard of stolen money, the IMF takes the one man who knows its hiding place on a bizarre submarine voyage.

programme.title: The Witch's Curse

programme.title: Incident In Lot 7
