programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician.

programme.title: Eatin Out
programme.desc: When the Bundy's receive a modest inheritance check from Peg's deceased uncle, they decide to splurge and eat out at an elegant restaurant.

programme.title: The Return of Darrin the Bold
programme.desc: Darrin is warlock for a day, courtesy of his interfering mother-in-law.

programme.title: Carnal Express
programme.desc: Hooker's link to a beautiful young Eurasian girl leads him to a ring of criminals funneling illegal automatic weapons through Chinatown, making it an armed camp.

programme.title: Blood Drops
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: My Favourite Magician
programme.desc: As a magician's (Ray Walston) assistant, David learns that the trickster has dangerous plans.

programme.title: Munich
programme.desc: From palaces to museums, the buildings in Munich are an intriguing mix of traditional Bavarian architecture and avant-garde design.

programme.title: Polar Park, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe meets some of Norway’s predators, including wolves, at the world’s northernmost animal park, Polar Park.

programme.title: Khirokitia
programme.desc: From the Neolithic village of Khirokitia to the beaches of Paphos, Sabrina Chakici explores all that the Troodos ranges in Cyprus have to offer.

programme.title: Split & Salona, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite learns about the Roman history of Croatia at Split, the second largest city in Croatia. She also visits the ruins of Salona.

programme.title: Sihanoukville 1
programme.desc: Longing for an adrenaline rush, Sukhmani goes to Sihanoukville, a popular Cambodian beach retreat, which is famous for its water sports.

programme.title: Majuli, Assam
programme.desc: Majuli, the world’s largest river island is known for many things, one of which is the ancient pottery tradition of Salmora village.

programme.title: Portugal
programme.desc: The stupendous architecture of Portugal’s monuments reveals the various stages of the country’s evolution.

programme.title: Bronnoysund, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe goes hiking in the Troll Mountains at Brønnøysund, and uncovers the folklore associated with them. He also tries cod fishing.

programme.title: Paphos
programme.desc: Paphos, in south-western Cyprus, is home to some spectacular archaeological attractions and a rich Cypriot history.

programme.title: Zadar, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite explores the offbeat attractions of Zadar, a Mediterranean port bursting with personality.

programme.title: Sihanoukville 2
programme.desc: Sukhmani loses her heart to the unspoiled beauty of the lesser-explored islands around the beach town of Sihanoukville.

programme.title: Majuli 2, Assam
programme.desc: From the neo-Vaishnavite cult practices at Satras to the distinct traditions of the Mishing tribes, Majuli is home to many unique cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Temple of Egypt
programme.desc: From the stories of famous Egyptian pharaohs to Greco-Roman beliefs, the ancient temples of Egypt contain mysteries waiting to unfold.

programme.title: Roros, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe explores the quaint historical Norwegian mining town, Røros. He also goes to Flåm, where he learns about the world’s steepest railway.

programme.title: Akamas National Park
programme.desc: Sabrina Chakici visits a donkey farm and finds out many interesting things about the national animal of Cyprus.

programme.title: Plitvice Lopar & Zagreb, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite explores the island life in Croatia, when she visits the charming Rab Island.

programme.title: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: The capital of Cambodia, Phnom Penh is littered with monuments that narrate stories of the country’s past.

programme.title: Bomdila, Arunachal Pradesh
programme.desc: From a festival of warriors to the zombie-proof houses of people, Alex explores the distinctive traditions of the tribes in Arunachal Pradesh.

programme.title: Flam, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe takes a train ride along Flåmsbana, the world’s steepest railway line. He also sees the stunning Nærøyfjord and learns about the Vikings.

programme.title: Budapest, Hungary
programme.desc: From a horse ride in the countryside to shooting lessons at a castle, Kirsty soaks in the classic charm of Budapest.

programme.title: Thailand 5 Must Do's For Kids
programme.desc: Offering a tropical playground for kids and adults alike, Thailand turns the challenge of planning a vacation with your kids into a breeze.

programme.title: Park Hyatt, Maldives
programme.desc: Indeya Passfield seeks local Maldivian experiences in Hadahaa, where she learns about the ecosystem, local traditions and cuisine.

programme.title: Episode No. 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Tawang, Arunachal Pradesh
programme.desc: From the traditions practiced at a monastery to the simple meals eaten by farmers, Alex experiences Tawang’s harmonious ways of life.

programme.title: Oslo, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie checks out the popular and offbeat attractions of Oslo, the capital of Norway. He also tries the ski jump at nearby Holmenkollen.

programme.title: Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: Exploring Innsbruck, Kirsty realizes that this Austrian town scores both as an Alpine activity center and as a showcase for Habsburg Empire heritage.

programme.title: Philippines Sun Downers
programme.desc: The Night is alive without a dull moment. Welcome for a dreamy rendezvous with the bewitching night and stay awake as we roll-out to you five sun-down options to spice your sojourn in the Philippines.

programme.title: Banyan Tree, Maldives
programme.desc: Indeya Passfield visits Vabbinfaru island, a hidden tropical gem just 20 minutes away from Male, the bustling capital of Maldives.

programme.title: Episode No. 2)
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: Munich
programme.desc: From palaces to museums, the buildings in Munich are an intriguing mix of traditional Bavarian architecture and avant-garde design.

programme.title: Samarkand, Uzbekistan
programme.desc: Stories of king Timur’s reign and the Silk road lie in the mosaic-covered masterpieces of ancient Samarkand.

programme.title: North Cape, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe sees the Northern Lights and rock carvings dating back to 7000 years ago, in Alta. He also stays in an ice hotel.

programme.title: Larnaca
programme.desc: Travel enthusiast, Sabrina sets out to find out more about the city but is waylaid when she finds a flock of flamingos at a lake side.

programme.title: Dubrovnik, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite finds out the three best ways to enjoy medieval seaside town of Dubrovnik, the pearl of the Adriatic.

programme.title: Siem Reap 1
programme.desc: When Sukhmani visits the Angkor temples, she is surprised to discover that these were not only shrines but also status symbols.

programme.title: Tromso, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe experiences the cuisine and the ways of life in the Arctic region, in Tromsø. He also sees one of the fastest tidal currents in the world.

programme.title: Siem Reap 2
programme.desc: Sukhmani visits Siem Reap and is delighted to find the energy of a big city and the charm of a small town.

programme.title: Bukhara, Uzbekistan
programme.desc: In the madrassahs and minarets of Bukhara, Alex Outhwaite finds parts of Central Asia that have remained nearly unchanged for centuries.

programme.title: Nicosia
programme.desc: Sabrina Chakici unravels the stories of Nicosia, the cultural heartbeat of Cyprus, through her experiences.

programme.title: Garo Hills, Meghalaya
programme.desc: Once a year, the Garo hills of Meghalaya come alive with the echoes of drums played by the villagers at the vibrant Hundred Drums Wangala Festival.

programme.title: Brac & Split, Croatia
programme.desc: After trying out a few adventurous activities in Brac?, Alex Outhwaite explores Diocletian’s Palace in Split.

programme.title: Tromso, Norway
programme.desc: Jamie Lowe experiences the cuisine and the ways of life in the Arctic region, in Tromsø. He also sees one of the fastest tidal currents in the world.

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 煞面迷影
programme.desc: 当年轻母亲为女儿莫名失踪而苦恼时，一连串怪异的事件接踵而至。这都可能与二十年前的意外亡魂为复仇归来有关...

programme.title: 画皮
programme.desc: 书生王怀卿卖画，为要筹药费救患重病的妻子，途中意外遇上雀妖的追击，幸得狐妖小容相救。为躲避雀妖，王怀卿将小容带回家中，三人随即陷入一场情感困局，而一段凄美的人妖虐恋亦随即展开。

programme.title: 军火大劫案
programme.desc: 特工阿文被安排潜伏于东南亚的军火商旗下，寻找其手中的一批军火炸药并将其销毁。当他终于找到该批军火后，却遭到不明匪徒袭击。为防止灾难发生，阿文决定与他的特工搭档阿琼合力夺回军火。

programme.title: 荒岛尸变
programme.desc: 一向酷爱钻研丧尸的Jeff，为追求刺激与朋友们勇闯一个荒废多年的神秘小岛。初时众人以为是个普通探险之旅，但冒险之旅却顿变为惊栗的旅程。直到他们被困荒岛，遇到丧尸的袭击，毫无还击之力之余，面对死亡的边缘，游戏才正式揭开序幕。

programme.title: 法中情
programme.desc: 摄影师田迪文强奸模特儿凌祖儿，幸得大律师叶颖文洗脱控罪。颖文男友高级督察方伟负责此案，不满女友是非不分。祖儿之妹凌珊珊替姐报仇，反遭田施暴，颖文再任其辩护律师。珊珊因过往不良纪录，处处失利，能够令田入罪的机会极微；检控官决定请师兄龙约翰出山相助。

programme.title: 铁线功夫拳
programme.desc: 习武多年的梁坤为守护心爱之人本不愿再过问江湖之事，却因此导致心爱之人惨死，梁坤也就此明白江湖的真意。他最终在丐帮长老苏灿的帮助下重返江湖，力战群寇，成功为爱人报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 打雀英雄传
programme.desc: 足智多谋的麻雀英雄，为避免年轻电脑专家的麻雀馆落入麻雀千王手上，不惜重新出山与千王鏖战。

programme.title: 曼谷风云
programme.desc: 地下拳手林枫因拒绝替曼谷黑帮打黑拳，因此被追杀。他虽成功逃脱，却失去记忆。当林枫开展其新生活时，却被黑帮发现行踪，并找来绝顶打手对付他。期间林枫忽然回复记忆，并誓要将黑帮歼灭。

programme.title: 千王斗千霸
programme.desc: 一位名震千坛的千王之王及其伙伴被政府雇用，以调查一名赌术了得的上海大亨。当局怀疑他藉开赌场掩饰其在上海情报机关的日本千霸身份。

programme.title: 白蛇传说
programme.desc: 这部奇幻动作片改编自中国经典传说《白蛇传》，讲述郎中许仙爱上化身为女子的千年白蛇。白蛇的真实身份被揭露后，高僧法海为守护人类与超自然力量之间的平衡，不得不挺身而出，展开一场惊心动魄的对决。

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: 夜迷藏
programme.desc: 电影由三个恐怖短故事组成：一个男人收到死神通报后，设法避过死亡；男人因心爱的妻子去世后伤心欲绝，他的妻子变成鬼魂与他通灵；三兄弟在一次晚餐聚会上为照顾年迈母亲的问题而争吵，最后竟变成一宗可怕的谋杀案。

programme.title: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come -- along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim.

programme.title: Winter's Fortune: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Tony Beets finally learns the fate of his Indian River claims -- pivotal to his 9,000-ounce season.

programme.title: This Is Going To Hurt
programme.desc: In Camden, Georgia, a driver leads deputies on a 150-mph chase before a high-speed PIT brings the pursuit to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Dive Hard With A Vengeance
programme.desc: After the raging storm, Ken learns the Myrtle Irene's fate. Shawn uses a new tool to hunt for new hotspots. Emily brings on a new crew member from her past.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Italy Fiat Barchetta
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turin and set about trying to rescue a rundown Fiat Barchetta. Unfortunately, parts prove almost impossible to find.

programme.title: A Letter From Hell
programme.desc: Two employees of Dayton, Ohio's most beloved bar, are beaten to death. On the case, Det. Doyle Burke investigates a series of bizarre clues.

programme.title: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will.

programme.title: Snatched
programme.desc: A nurse's aide walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine.

programme.title: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: The Lost Grave Of Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Josh saddles up to investigate a scandal over Wild West legend Buffalo Bill Cody's remains. The body may have been stolen and buried 500 miles away.

programme.title: Santas Fury Road To Riches
programme.desc: In a modern-day treasure hunt, Matt Paxton and his team gamble on finding rare, potentially valuable items buried inside cluttered, filthy homes.

programme.title: When Parker Met Rick
programme.desc: Rick Ness takes a job working on 16-year-old Parker Schnabel's gold mine. The two miners form a strong bond, bringing in millions in gold.

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Forest fires threaten to shut down Parker's Sulphur Creek claim before he can get all the gold out.

programme.title: Skipper Harris In Training
programme.desc: Blood is spilled on the Cape Caution, when a brutal storm rips across the Bering Sea. Rookie boat owner, Josh Harris swallows his pride.

programme.title: Fisherman's Daughter
programme.desc: Sig welcomes their newest greenhorn: his daughter. After four generations of Hansen fishermen, the next in line is a woman!

programme.title: Blonde Ambition
programme.desc: Blood is spilled on the Cape Caution when a brutal storm rips across the Bering Sea. Rookie boat owner, Josh Harris swallows his pride.

programme.title: Shipwreck Triangle Of Greece
programme.desc: Josh dives into the mystery of a Greek sea passage that claimed 58 ships. Separating fact from myth, he uncovers why it rivals the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Makozilla
programme.desc: A wave of savage assaults against the sea lion population off California's coast has sparked fears of a monstrous predator dubbed "Mako-Zilla".

programme.title: Matt's National Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Matt chases a rare copy of the Declaration of Independence in a jam-packed hoard and digs through a 4,000-square-foot chicken coop for vintage motorcycles.

programme.title: New Levels Of Chaos
programme.desc: Parker unleashes chaos as the team tries to get four wash plants running. Tony splurges on a new wash plant to get more gold.

programme.title: When Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Darkness falls on Nugget Creek, pushing Dustin to search for Plan B. But his crew has a breakthrough, shining light on the season's final month.

programme.title: Makozilla
programme.desc: A wave of savage assaults against the sea lion population off California's coast has sparked fears of a monstrous predator dubbed "Mako-Zilla".

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 无限复活
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】李伯仁是澳门赌场的高手，梦想征战拉斯维加斯，却因女友离弃、朋友嘲笑而陷入困境。他冒险借钱赴赌城，手风虽顺却接连遭遇不测。一场车祸后，他在调查干探提娜面前揭开真相。命运因神秘红番回头石发生翻转，让他有机会重写人生。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 妻子的浪漫旅行6
programme.desc: 一档以爱与理解为精神内核的夫妻对话真人秀。四对夫妻通过这趟旅行学习和借鉴其他夫妻的相处之道，让夫妻重新审视彼此关系，学会换位思考，达到治愈婚姻的目的。

programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 你比星光美丽
programme.desc: 该剧讲述了北漂女孩纪星（谭松韵饰）不甘于压抑内卷的职场生活，辞职走上艰苦创业之路，最终成功拉到投资人韩廷（许凯饰）入伙，二人在医疗与健康行业中携手共进。

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bridge

programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: Edmond Elephant's Birthday

programme.title: The Biggest Muddy Puddle in the World
programme.desc: Peppa and George wake up one morning to find that all the rain has made a flood, and their house is now a desert island!

programme.title: Potato City
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park that has a vegetable theme.

programme.title: The New House
programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbors are?

programme.title: Basketball
programme.desc: Daddy teaches the kids how to play basketball, and it is not long before they are good enough to take on a team.

programme.title: Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes

programme.title: Parroting Pups / Merpups Save the Turbots
programme.desc: Rocky loses his voice and can't bark out his puppack tools, but Matea the parrot has no problem doing it for him. // The Magical Mer Moon means the Merpups are back, only this time they're helping the PAW Patrol on a rescue.

programme.title: Pups Save A Royal Painting
programme.desc: Sweetie steals a painting of the Princess and attempts to replace it with one of herself.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Double Dare You

programme.title: Bogweed
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai.

programme.title: Prizes
programme.desc: After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: Toy

programme.title: Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: Chloe's Big Friends
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children don't want to play any "baby" games.

programme.title: Gym Class

programme.title: 综艺大热门25
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。
